mapper.select: SELECT id, name, condition_type, condition_value, icon, description FROM badges ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO badges (name, condition_type, condition_value, icon, description) VALUES (#{name}, #{conditionType}, #{conditionValue}, #{icon}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE badges SET name = #{name}, condition_type = #{conditionType}, condition_value = #{conditionValue}, icon = #{icon}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_badges (user_id, badge_id, obtained_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{badgeId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_badges WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND badge_id = #{badgeId}
